name: URBAN ONE, INC.
summary: Urban One, Inc. is an urban-oriented, multi-media company primarily targeting African-American and urban consumers. It operates the largest radio broadcasting network targeting African-American listeners, with 76 broadcast stations in 13 markets. It also operates TV One and CLEO TV cable networks, Reach Media syndicated programming, and Interactive One digital platforms including iONE Digital, Bossip, HipHopWired, and MadameNoire.

products.name: Radio One
products.description: Core radio broadcasting franchise operating 76 stations including FM, AM, HD, and low power TV stations in 13 U.S. markets.

products.name: TV One
products.description: Cable television network targeting African-American and urban viewers.

products.name: CLEO TV
products.description: Cable television network targeting African-American and urban viewers, operated alongside TV One.

products.name: Reach Media
products.description: Syndicated programming assets including Rickey Smiley Morning Show, Get Up! Mornings with Erica Campbell, and DL Hughley Show.

products.name: Interactive One
products.description: Digital platform serving African-American community via iONE Digital, Cassius, Bossip, HipHopWired, and MadameNoire.

products.name: One Solution
products.description: Advertising and marketing solution brand leveraging Urban One's multi-media national operations.
